svg.title: Z01a optical calibration setup with corrected etalon gap measurements and thermal range
svg.desc: Schematic of Ne lamp, 630 nm filter, baffled field stop, FPI etalon with gap annotations, imaging lens, and CCD. Etalon gap shows ICOS and 25C pre-load values. Thermal box shows plus minus 2C orbital range giving plus minus 37 nm variation.

g.text: Orbital range ±2°C → d varies ±37 nm about 25°C setpoint
Heater control ±0.1°C → d stable to ±1.9 nm (~0.001 fringe)

svg.text: Z01a optical calibration setup — Ne lamp filtered to OI 630 nm
baffled 1.65° field stop · static source (v_rel = 0) · single-line Tolansky → ε₀
